items.prompt:
Read the selection from the text:
“Anything flying through the air, whether it's a baseball, 767 jumbo jet, or a bee, acquires a strong positive electrostatic charge due to interaction with air molecules,” Stephen Buchmann told Science News. Buchmann, who did not work on the study, is an entomologist. A scientist who studies bugs, he works at the University of Arizona in Tucson.

Robert and his coworkers showed that bees notice electric fields and can use them to pick among flowers.
Select the statement that best explains why the author chose to include this selection.

options.text: The author included this selection to establish that bees can control how they utilize electric fields.
The author included this selection to establish that Buchmann’s research is the key to all research that followed.
The author included this selection to establish that non-living objects were needed for comparison purposes in the ongoing electrical charge research.
The author included this selection to establish that there was existing scientific evidence about bees having positive electric charge, which aided scientists in developing the pollination studies.

items.prompt:
Read the sentences from the text.
Scientists report that bees and flowers appear to have a charged communication. In addition to a flower's color and scent, its electric field may also bring in bees, a new study shows.
The word charged has multiple meanings. What does the word charged most likely suggest about bees and flowers in the text? Select two options.

options.text: Bees are excited to communicate with flowers.
Bees can feel a type of power given off by flowers.
Flowers can control their communication with bees.
Bees attack flowers when there is not enough nectar.
Bees rush toward flowers when they want to get nectar.
Flowers communicate with bees by using a form of electricity.

items.prompt:
The following question has two parts. First, answer part A. Then, answer part B.

Part A

Which statement best summarizes the central idea of the text?

options.text: Bees have positive electric fields, and flowers have negative electric fields.
Flowers may give off an electrical charge that makes bees attracted to them.
Bees are attracted to all flowers, even plastic ones, when there is an electric field.
Flowers have an electric field that might tell bees when there is not enough nectar.

items.prompt:
Part B

Which sentence from the text best supports your answer in part A?

options.text: “So bees, as they buzz about, can become positively charged.”
“Toward the tail end of 50 visits to the 'flowers,' most bees had learned to find the sweet ones.”
“The flower's field reacted to the approaching bee with a small increase in strength.”
“That electrical boost lingered for a little while after the bee had flown away.”
